title: Diplazium biserratum
taxonomy: Diplazium biserratum is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is a type of vascular plant, belonging to the kingdom Plantae. The classification of Diplazium biserratum is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, phylum - Pteridophyta, class - Polypodiopsida, order - Polypodiales, family - Athyriaceae, genus - Diplazium, species - D. biserratum. This species is native to certain parts of Asia. It is a relatively rare species, and more research is needed to understand its full classification and characteristics.
uses: Diplazium biserratum is a species of fern that has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia.
